name: Banana Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup of the flour, the baking powder, baking soda and salt in a large bowl.
2. Gradually blend in water, beating with a whisk until smooth.
3. Peel bananas, making a total of 12 pieces. Cut each banana into 3 pieces, crosswise.
4. Coat bananas lightly with remaining cup of flour.
5. Heat oil in wok over medium-high heat until it reaches 375 degrees.
6. Dip bananas in flour-water mixture, coating completely.
7. Cook 4 to 6 pieces at a time in the oil, until golden, 3 to 5 minutes.
8. Drain on absorbent paper. Serve hot with ice cream.
